-## 🎯 MAJOR STRATEGIC PIVOT (Week 18)
-**Dev Budget Restructuring:**

-- S3 targeted dev: $100 → $0
-- E1 targeted dev: $100 → $0

-**Ops Cut:**
-- Ops: $1,200 → **$900/day** (save $300/day) — triggered NOW (was planned Week 21)
-

-

-- Quality 0.33 → ~3% churn → subscriber count stabilizes → burn ~$950/day

+## Billing Wave Analysis (Next Weeks)
+- Week 20 (Days 134-140): **422 subs billing** (mod30=14-20) — first $15 bills! ~25-30 churn

+## Competitive Environment (Week 19 — CONCERNING)
+- **16 competitor event posts this week** (vs 8 last week) — high competitor activity
+- Events Days 127-130: ApexSaaS, RivalTech, CloudPeak, QuantumEdge, NexGen all shipped updates
+- Each event raises S1 quality expectations by ~0.011
+- 16 events × 0.011 = ~0.176 cumulative pressure (but many may be duplicates)
+- HOWEVER: churn improved (33 vs 40) and conversion improved (4.82% vs 2.89%)
+- The quality improvement (+0.015/week) is currently outpacing expectation drift
+- Social post Day 133: Multiple positive responses to quality improvements!
 
 ## Global Quality Bonus — CRITICAL FINDING
-- Natural decay of global bonus: ~0.00473/week (regardless of competitor events)
-- At $400/day global dev: net change = -0.0023/week (insufficient to maintain)
-- At $810/day global dev: break-even (maintain but don't grow)
-- At $0/day global dev: decay = -0.00473/week
-- **CONCLUSION**: Global dev at <$810/day is WASTED MONEY. Better to put $ into targeted dev.

-- Net S1 Plan A quality: (0.02338 - 0.00473) × 0.75 = **+0.01397/week**

-## Important Findings (Week 18)
-1. **Global dev at $400/day was DECLINING global quality** — natural decay = 0.00473/week. Need $810/day just to maintain. WASTED MONEY at $400/day!
-2. **Competitor events critically important**: 8 events in 4 days raised S1 expectations enough to cause 7.1% churn (vs 4.65% previous week, despite quality IMPROVING)
-3. **S2 q_min = 0.519 (±40%)** → range 0.311-0.727. Current best quality (Plan C T3) = 0.3544, BELOW even lower bound. S2 customers unserviceable currently.
-4. **225 open issues** → support complaints 4-5 days wait → damaging conversion (2.89% vs 4.68%) and reputation
-5. **R&D minimum: $166,667** (T1) — completely unaffordable with $149K cash
-6. **Capacity Tier 2** ($530/day): usage 157K/day avg vs Tier 2 max 800K. Can't downgrade to Tier 1 (max 200K) due to peak usage risk.
-7. **PMI declining**: 46.1→45.3 (-0.8), contraction cycle. Companies scrutinizing SaaS spend.
-8. **Social post #18** (Day 126): Support accountability + quality roadmap. Addressing reputation crisis.
+- Natural decay of global bonus: ~0.0030/week (actual measured, better than predicted 0.0047)
+- At $0/day global dev: decay = -0.0030/week (slightly better)
+- CONCLUSION: Global dev unnecessary. S1 targeted dev at $800/day is optimal.
+

+- With price $18 at quality 0.34 (Week 21): expect ~6-7% then improving
